title: pelargonium × metempsychodes
intro: Pelargonium × metempsychodes, also known as the Mountain Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, a hybrid between Pelargonium linifolium and Pelargonium asperum. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Mountain Geranium include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium × metempsychodes include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
